connections.def: from a derivative of 3886; as if dissolved, i.e. "paralytic":--that had (sick of) the palsy. see GREEK for

connections.gloss: feeble, sick of the (taken with) palsy
connections.def: from 3844 and 3089; to loosen beside, i.e. relax (perfect passive participle, paralyzed or enfeebled):--feeble, sick of the (taken with) palsy. see GREEK for 3844 see GREEK for
